concepts.label: Door
concepts.definition: Hinged barrier that opens and closes to allow or prevent passage through an entrance

concepts.label: Window
concepts.definition: Opening in a wall or door fitted with glass to allow light and air to enter

concepts.label: Roof
concepts.definition: Structure covering the upper part of a building to protect it from weather

concepts.label: Wall
concepts.definition: Vertical structure that divides or encloses an area within a building

concepts.label: Floor
concepts.definition: Lower surface of a room on which one walks

concepts.label: Ceiling
concepts.definition: Upper interior surface of a room or other enclosed space

concepts.label: Stairs
concepts.definition: Set of steps leading from one floor to another in a building

concepts.label: Basement
concepts.definition: Room or floor below ground level in a building

concepts.label: Attic
concepts.definition: Space or room just below the roof of a building

concepts.label: Garage
concepts.definition: Building or space for housing motor vehicles

concepts.label: Balcony
concepts.definition: Platform projecting from the wall of a building with a railing

concepts.label: Garden
concepts.definition: Outdoor area where plants, flowers, or vegetables are grown

concepts.label: Fence
concepts.definition: Barrier made of posts and wire or wood to enclose an area

concepts.label: Mailbox
concepts.definition: Container for receiving mail delivered by postal service

concepts.label: Living Room
concepts.definition: Main room in a home where family gathers and entertains guests

concepts.label: Bedroom
concepts.definition: Room used primarily for sleeping

concepts.label: Kitchen
concepts.definition: Room where food is prepared and cooked

concepts.label: Bathroom
concepts.definition: Room containing toilet and washing facilities

concepts.label: Hallway
concepts.definition: Narrow passage connecting rooms in a building

concepts.label: Closet
concepts.definition: Small room or cupboard used for storage, especially clothes

concepts.label: Dining Room
concepts.definition: Room where meals are eaten

concepts.label: Study
concepts.definition: Room used for reading, writing, or academic work

concepts.label: Pantry
concepts.definition: Small room or cupboard for storing food and dishes

concepts.label: Laundry Room
concepts.definition: Room containing washing machine and facilities for cleaning clothes

concepts.label: Porch
concepts.definition: Covered entrance to a building, usually with a separate roof

concepts.label: Chimney
concepts.definition: Vertical channel conducting smoke from a fireplace to the outside

concepts.label: Foundation
concepts.definition: Base structure of a building that transfers loads to the ground

concepts.label: Gutter
concepts.definition: Channel along roof edge for carrying away rainwater

concepts.label: Shutter
concepts.definition: Hinged cover for a window that can be closed for security or privacy

concepts.label: Doorbell
concepts.definition: Device that rings or chimes to announce a visitor at the door

concepts.label: Doorknob
concepts.definition: Handle used to open and close a door

concepts.label: Lock
concepts.definition: Mechanical or electronic device that secures doors or containers

concepts.label: Key
concepts.definition: Metal instrument used to operate a lock

concepts.label: Hinge
concepts.definition: Joint that allows a door or lid to open and close

concepts.label: Threshold
concepts.definition: Strip of material forming the bottom of a doorway

concepts.label: Window Frame
concepts.definition: Structure that holds window glass and fits into wall opening

concepts.label: Window Sill
concepts.definition: Horizontal ledge at the bottom of a window

concepts.label: Curtain
concepts.definition: Piece of fabric hung to cover a window

concepts.label: Blind
concepts.definition: Screen for a window made of slats that can be adjusted

concepts.label: Glass
concepts.definition: Transparent material used in windows and containers

concepts.label: Stove
concepts.definition: Kitchen appliance used for cooking food with gas or electricity

concepts.label: Oven
concepts.definition: Enclosed compartment for baking or roasting food using heat

concepts.label: Refrigerator
concepts.definition: Appliance that keeps food cold to prevent spoilage

concepts.label: Freezer
concepts.definition: Compartment or appliance that freezes food for long-term storage

concepts.label: Dishwasher
concepts.definition: Machine that automatically cleans dishes and utensils

concepts.label: Microwave
concepts.definition: Oven that heats food using electromagnetic radiation

concepts.label: Pot
concepts.definition: Deep cooking vessel with a handle and sometimes a lid

concepts.label: Pan
concepts.definition: Shallow cooking vessel with a long handle used for frying

concepts.label: Knife
concepts.definition: Sharp-bladed instrument used for cutting food

concepts.label: Fork
concepts.definition: Utensil with prongs used for eating and serving food

concepts.label: Spoon
concepts.definition: Utensil with a bowl-shaped end used for eating liquid foods

concepts.label: Plate
concepts.definition: Flat dish for serving or eating food

concepts.label: Bowl
concepts.definition: Deep round dish for serving food or liquids

concepts.label: Cup
concepts.definition: Small container for drinking liquids, typically with a handle

concepts.label: Glass
concepts.definition: Container for drinking made of glass or similar material

concepts.label: Cutting Board
concepts.definition: Flat surface used for cutting and preparing food

concepts.label: Blender
concepts.definition: Electric appliance that mixes and purees food

concepts.label: Toaster
concepts.definition: Electric appliance for browning bread slices

concepts.label: Coffee Maker
concepts.definition: Appliance for brewing coffee automatically

concepts.label: Can Opener
concepts.definition: Tool used to open metal cans containing food

concepts.label: Spatula
concepts.definition: Flat tool used for flipping and serving food

concepts.label: Whisk
concepts.definition: Tool with wire loops used for beating eggs or cream

concepts.label: Colander
concepts.definition: Bowl with holes used for draining pasta or washing vegetables

concepts.label: Measuring Cup
concepts.definition: Container marked with volume measurements for cooking

concepts.label: Timer
concepts.definition: Device that measures time intervals for cooking

concepts.label: Cookbook
concepts.definition: Book containing recipes and cooking instructions

concepts.label: Apron

concepts.label: Oven Mitt
concepts.definition: Protective glove for handling hot cookware

concepts.label: Kitchen Counter
concepts.definition: Flat work surface in kitchen for food preparation

concepts.label: Cabinet
concepts.definition: Storage compartment with doors, typically mounted on walls

concepts.label: Drawer
concepts.definition: Sliding compartment in furniture for storage

concepts.label: Sink
concepts.definition: Basin with faucets used for washing dishes or hands

concepts.label: Faucet
concepts.definition: Device that controls flow of water from pipes

concepts.label: Garbage Disposal
concepts.definition: Electric device that grinds food waste in kitchen sink

concepts.label: Cooking
concepts.definition: Process of preparing food by heating or combining ingredients

concepts.label: Frying
concepts.definition: Method of cooking food in hot oil or fat

concepts.label: Baking
concepts.definition: Method of cooking food using dry heat in an oven

concepts.label: Boiling
concepts.definition: Method of cooking food in bubbling hot water

concepts.label: Grilling
concepts.definition: Method of cooking food over direct heat or flame

concepts.label: Roasting
concepts.definition: Method of cooking food with dry heat in oven or over fire

concepts.label: Steaming
concepts.definition: Method of cooking food using steam from boiling water

concepts.label: Shower

concepts.label: Bathtub
concepts.definition: Large container for holding water in which to bathe

concepts.label: Toilet
concepts.definition: Plumbing fixture used for urination and defecation

concepts.label: Mirror
concepts.definition: Reflective surface used to see one's appearance

concepts.label: Towel

concepts.label: Soap
concepts.definition: Cleansing agent used with water for washing

concepts.label: Toothbrush

concepts.label: Toothpaste

concepts.label: Shampoo
concepts.definition: Liquid soap specifically for washing hair

concepts.label: Conditioner
concepts.definition: Hair care product that softens and smooths hair

concepts.label: Body Wash

concepts.label: Razor
concepts.definition: Sharp tool used for removing body hair by cutting

concepts.label: Toilet Paper
concepts.definition: Soft paper used for personal hygiene after using toilet

concepts.label: Bath Mat

concepts.label: Shower Curtain
concepts.definition: Waterproof barrier that prevents water from leaving shower area

concepts.label: Hair Dryer
concepts.definition: Electric device that blows hot air to dry hair

concepts.label: Lotion
concepts.definition: Liquid or cream applied to skin for moisturizing

concepts.label: Deodorant
concepts.definition: Product applied to prevent or mask body odor

concepts.label: Shirt

concepts.label: T-Shirt
concepts.definition: Casual shirt with short sleeves and no collar

concepts.label: Pants

concepts.label: Jeans

concepts.label: Jacket

concepts.label: Coat
concepts.definition: Long outer garment worn for warmth or protection

concepts.label: Shoes
concepts.definition: Footwear that covers and protects feet

concepts.label: Boots

concepts.label: Sneakers

concepts.label: Socks

concepts.label: Hat
concepts.definition: Head covering worn for protection, warmth, or fashion

concepts.label: Cap
concepts.definition: Soft hat with a visor, often worn for sports or casual wear

concepts.label: Gloves

concepts.label: Mittens

concepts.label: Scarf

concepts.label: Belt
concepts.definition: Strap worn around waist to support pants or for decoration

concepts.label: Dress

concepts.label: Skirt
concepts.definition: Garment worn by women hanging from waist down

concepts.label: Sweater

concepts.label: Underwear

concepts.label: Pajamas

concepts.label: Shorts

concepts.label: Swimsuit

concepts.label: Cotton

concepts.label: Denim
concepts.definition: Sturdy cotton fabric used primarily for making jeans

concepts.label: Leather
concepts.definition: Material made from animal hide used for shoes and accessories

concepts.label: Square

concepts.label: Pen

concepts.label: Paper

concepts.label: Glue
concepts.definition: Adhesive substance used to stick objects together

concepts.label: Ruler
concepts.definition: Straight edge marked with units for measuring length

concepts.label: Binder

concepts.label: Desk

concepts.label: Chair

concepts.label: Lamp

concepts.label: Calculator

concepts.definition: Device that holds and dispenses adhesive tape

concepts.label: Marker

concepts.definition: Circular control device used to steer vehicles

concepts.definition: Pipe that carries waste gases from engine to outside

concepts.label: Battery
concepts.definition: Device that stores electrical energy for vehicle systems

concepts.label: Seat
concepts.definition: Cushioned furniture piece for sitting in vehicles

concepts.label: Seatbelt
concepts.definition: Safety strap that secures occupants in vehicle seats

concepts.label: Dashboard

concepts.definition: Instrument that displays vehicle's current speed

concepts.definition: Front window of vehicle made of safety glass

concepts.label: Trunk

concepts.definition: Flashing light that indicates direction of vehicle turn

concepts.label: Airbag

concepts.label: Radiator

concepts.label: Spark Plug

concepts.label: Fuel Pump

concepts.label: Carburetor

concepts.label: Muffler

concepts.label: Suspension

concepts.label: Clutch

concepts.label: Brake Pad

concepts.label: Brake Disc

concepts.label: Axle

concepts.label: Drive Shaft

concepts.label: Universal Joint

concepts.label: Piston

concepts.definition: Component that connects piston to crankshaft in engine

concepts.label: Camshaft

concepts.label: Timing Belt

concepts.label: Water Pump

concepts.label: Thermostat

concepts.label: Power Steering
concepts.definition: System that assists driver in steering vehicle with reduced effort

concepts.label: Car

concepts.label: Truck

concepts.label: Motorcycle

concepts.label: Train

concepts.label: Airplane

concepts.label: Boat
concepts.definition: Watercraft designed for travel on water

concepts.label: Ship
concepts.definition: Large watercraft for carrying passengers or cargo on water

concepts.label: Building
concepts.definition: Structure with walls and roof designed for human occupancy

concepts.label: House

concepts.label: Apartment
concepts.definition: Self-contained housing unit within larger building

concepts.label: Office

concepts.label: Hospital
concepts.definition: Institution providing medical treatment for sick or injured

concepts.label: Store

concepts.label: Wood

concepts.label: Metal
concepts.definition: Hard shiny material such as iron, steel, or aluminum

concepts.label: Plastic

concepts.label: Aluminum

concepts.label: Iron

concepts.label: Rubber

concepts.label: Fabric

concepts.label: Ceramic

concepts.label: Paint
